selectionPatterns.description: Select a CSS token — property name, value keyword, selector segment, or identifier. The smallest meaningful unit.
Expand to the full property declaration (property: value) excluding the semicolon. Covers name and value as a unit.
Expand to the full property statement including the trailing semicolon. One complete CSS declaration.
Expand to the full CSS rule block — selector(s) plus all declarations within the braces.
Expand to the full @media block including the condition and all nested rules.
Expand to the full @keyframes block including the animation name and all keyframe stops.
Expand to the full @supports feature query block.
Expand to the full @layer cascade layer block.
Expand to the full multi-line comment block including /* and */ delimiters.
Expand to the entire file content. The outermost selection level.
